verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why Worry When you can pray; Trust Jesus, He'll be your stay. Don't be a doubting Thomas; Rest fully on His promise. Why worry, worry, worry, worry When you can pray

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A news came to Jesus on His way to Judea Lazarus has died four days ago Mary acclaimed if Jesus would have come Lazarus would be living and have not died

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Then Jesus told them have faith in God He has a way just trust in Him Let the glory of God be manifested Don't you worry, worry, But pray, pray, pray and pray

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When Jesus rose up from His painful death He showed Himself to His disciples But Thomas was not there That's why he did not believe He said to himself, "I must see Him first"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But Jesus reached him in his unbelief Look at Me, Thomas, that you may believe Cast away your doubts and all your fears Don't you worry, worry, But have faith in God

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Got any rivers that you think are uncrossable? Got any mountains you can't tunnel through? God is the Master of things thought impossible And surely He can do What other pow'r can't do

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Joshua and Caleb believed in what God could do They didn't worry'cause God was in control The giants were too big, but they were all defeated Don't you worry, worry For God is here to stay
